name: Pumpkin Marble Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs, pecans and margarine; press onto bottom and 1 1/2-inches up sides of 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
2. Combine cream cheese, 3/4 cup sugar and vanilla, mixing at medium speed on electric mixer until well blended. Add eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Reserve 1 cup batter, chill.
3. Add remaining sugar, pumpkin and spices to remaining batter; mix well. Alternately layer pumpkin and cream cheese batters over crust.
4. Bake at 350°F for 55 minutes. Loosen cake from rim of pan; cool before removing rim of pan. Chill.
